skill_availability_goal: Verify that env-config-auditor writes feature-scoped audit reports under the confirmed 4-level feature_path and returns to PM/Engineer when the path is unclear.
prompt: 对 chat-interface/messages/history/search 这个功能做环境配置审计。仓库里已经有 docs/pm/chat-interface/messages/history/search/PRD.md、docs/engineer/chat-interface/messages/history/search/TRD.md 和 docs/engineer/chat-interface/messages/history/search/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md。请把 feature-scoped 报告写到正确的 DevOps 路径；如果路径不清就应回 PM/Engineer，而不是新建并列目录。
